description: Tracks active open-source AI agent repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs
Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!
The agent that grows with you
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
Easiest and laziest way for  building multi-agent LLMs applications.
🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！
AI generates editable, beautifully designed PPTX from any document — no design skills needed    | 15 examples, 229 pages

The simplest desktop client for OpenClaw 🦞 — bridge your Agent to WeChat, Feishu, Slack & Discord in one click. Works with Claude Code, Codex & any LLM. BYOK, Oauth, local-first, chat from your phone 24/7.
GoClaw - GoClaw is OpenClaw rebuilt in Go — with multi-tenant isolation, 5-layer security, and native concurrency. Deploy AI agent teams at scale without compromising on safety.
the easiest way to run natural language-described workflows automatically
Create AI Agents in a No-Code Visual Builder or TypeScript SDK with full 2-way sync. For shipping AI assistants and multi-agent AI workflows.
🦞 Your AI Personal Assistant.  An intelligent assistant with memory, skills, and scheduled tasks that truly understands you . Helping you tackle everything in work and life.
One dashboard to scan, find, and fix everything Claude Code loads — security scanner, context budget, scope management. npx @mcpware/claude-code-organizer
Autonomous AI agent that contributes to open source — discovers repos, analyzes code, generates fixes, and submits PRs
